examples: While Stella napped, Sally would clean her home in Jackson, New Jersey, wiping down doorknobs and light switches.
The researchers asked them if they napped and for how long.
They tired shortly after lunch—another fete in my honor—and napped in the early afternoon.
This past Saturday I sat down to catch up on some work while my two-year-old napped.
Granted, I might have otherwise napped and built a small fort out of my hotel bed sheets.
